overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit underpass at night, ascending a staircase, and emerging into a massive downtown plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The environment features vibrant color-changing neon lights and a dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with dynamic neon installation

events.description: neon wall panels begin cycling through rainbow colors from red to green
neon panels shift from green to blue to purple hues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the underpass, passing by the color-changing neon wall

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure with horizontal beams spanning the walkway
vertical light panels cycling through red, green, blue, and purple colors
yellow and white striped construction barriers lining the edge of the road
empty asphalt street running parallel to the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban underpass at night, with a dynamic color-changing neon light installation running along the right wall. The concrete walkway is bordered by yellow construction barriers on the left separating it from the empty road. The neon panels continuously cycle through vibrant hues, casting colored reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell with perforated metal walls

events.description: turns right and enters dark stairwell from the underpass
warm orange light from perforated wall panels illuminates the ascending stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the exit, with the city lights visible at the top of the stairwell

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading upward with illuminated edges
dark metal walls with geometric cutout patterns emitting orange light

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a dark concrete stairwell and ascending the steps away from the underpass. The stairwell features perforated metal walls with embedded orange lighting patterns creating geometric shadows. As the camera climbs higher, the bright glow of the city becomes visible through the exit at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown plaza surrounded by mega-corporation skyscrapers

events.description: exits stairwell into vast open plaza with towering illuminated skyscrapers
camera tilts upward to view the full height of the surrounding skyscrapers
flying vehicle passes between the Militech building and adjacent tower

agents.ego_description: emerging from the stairs and looking up at the massive corporate towers, observing the flying traffic

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle passing between the skyscrapers at high altitude

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with large red neon signage and geometric logo
tall tower with illuminated orange signage near the top
dark skyscraper with prominent yellow neon lettering and vertical light strips
tall vertical displays showing colorful advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a vast open plaza surrounded by colossal skyscrapers adorned with bright neon signage and holographic advertisements for corporations including Petrochem, Kang Tao, and Militech. The camera pans upward to take in the dizzying height of the towers against the night sky, and a flying vehicle briefly passes by the Militech building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit urban underpass into the overwhelming scale of a futuristic downtown plaza. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway bordered by yellow construction barriers, where dynamic neon panels cycle through vibrant hues that reflect off the wet pavement. The camera then turns right into a dark concrete stairwell, ascending past perforated metal walls with orange geometric lighting as the bright glow of the city emerges at the top. As the camera exits the stairs, the scene opens into a vast plaza surrounded by colossal skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements for Petrochem, Kang Tao, and Militech. Finally, the view pans upward to capture the dizzying height of the towers against the night sky just as a flying vehicle passes by the Militech building.
